name: Honey Baked Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Core the apples, being careful not to cut all the way through to the bottom.
3. Peel about one-third of the way down from the stem end.
4. Combine honey and orange juice in a small bowl.
5. Pour the mixture into the centers of the apples.
6. Place the apples in a baking dish with a little hot water at the bottom.
7. Bake for 50 minutes, or until the apples are tender.
8. Sprinkle the tops with sugar and nutmeg before serving.
